seo.heading1: Why Dive in Hurghada with Azure Abyss?
seo.p1: Hurghada sits on the western shore of the Red Sea, offering some of the world's most biodiverse underwater ecosystems. With over 1,100 species of fish and pristine coral gardens, it is globally recognized as a premier scuba diving destination.

faq.a: Yes – Hurghada is one of Egypt's best diving destinations, with year-round visibility of 20–30 metres, warm water temperatures, and rich marine biodiversity.

faq.q: How much does diving in Hurghada cost?
faq.a: Private diving lessons with Azure Abyss start from $120 for a Discovery session. Our packages range up to $950 for a full-day Elite Master program.

faq.q: Do I need experience to dive in Hurghada?
faq.a: No experience is needed. Our Discovery package is designed specifically for first-timers and is completely safe under private instructor supervision.

faq.q: What is the best time to dive in Hurghada?
faq.a: Hurghada offers excellent diving year-round. Water temperature ranges from 22°C in winter to 28°C in summer, with visibility consistently above 20 metres.
